title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF LUY-A AND DAYHAGON IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MEDELLIN, PROVINCE OF CEBU.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4926 / 58 OG No. 24, 4482 (June 11, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3376, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF LUY-A AND DAYHAGON IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MEDELLIN, PROVINCE OF CEBU.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Luy-a and Dayhagon in the Municipality of Medellin, Province of Cebu, are converted into barrios of said municipality to be known as the barrios of Luy-a and Dayhagon, respectively.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
